targets.name: gift-card balance and code search filters match

notes: HAR-457 rework adds executable strict parity for giftCards/giftCardsCount search behavior that was previously covered only by integration tests. The live capture records the post-credit/debit, pre-deactivation gift-card state so `balance_status:partial`, `balance_status:full`, `balance_status:empty`, `balance_status:full_or_partial`, and visible code-fragment search are compared against the local proxy without customer-visible notification delivery.
